data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for permission-scoped management.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for permission-scoped management, specifically that the plugin cannot edit unrelated sets. However, the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for permission-scoped management, but there is no direct evidence showing that this requirement has been satisfied or tested.
gaps: No evidence of permission-scoped management functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
